title: mserver crashes under specific combination of JOIN and WHERE conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE foo (startdate DATE NOT NULL, enddate DATE NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE bar (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT);
INSERT INTO foo (startdate, enddate) VALUES ('2020-01-01', '2020-12-31'), (NULL, '2021-12-31'), ('2019-01-01', NULL);

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM foo AS A INNER JOIN foo AS B ON (B.startdate IS NULL OR (B.startdate = A.startdate AND B.enddate IS NOT NULL)) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bar WHERE A.startdate < '2021-01-01') AND A.enddate > '2020-01-01';
key_bug_features: JOIN and WHERE conditions causing mserver crashes
